arts.ttl: Jorthy Mokio: Chelsea lead Arsenal for Ajax star who can become the new Declan Rice
arts.sum: Arsenal, Chelsea and Manchester City are among the Premier League giants following the progress of 16-year-old Ajax sensation Jorthy Mokio. Chelsea lead Arsenal for Ajax star who can become the new Declan Rice

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Chelsea eyeing 16-year-old Ajax wonder kid
arts.sum: Chelsea are seemingly covering all bases when it comes to transfers now, and are looking to the future if their interest in Ajax’s 16-year-old, Jorthy Mokio, is anything to go by. The versatile Belgian international who started his career at Gent before moving to Ajax on a free transfer, is on the radar of top […] The post Exclusive: Chelsea eyeing 16-year-old Ajax wonder kid appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Frankfurt on Ajax: “really tough opponent, but also a club we are looking forward to playing against”
arts.sum: Eintracht Frankfurt have been looking ahead to the meeting with Ajax following the Europa League's draw.
